title: Eclat-Floral
description: Éclat Floral is a luxury-style online flower shop built with Django. The project includes product browsing, category filtering, product detail pages, cart management, user authentication, checkout flow preparation, and a custom admin dashboard.
challenge: Creating a refined boutique shopping experience while keeping the ordering flow simple, clear, and responsive across desktop and mobile.
solution: Used Django’s template system and model-view structure to separate product data, cart logic, account flows, and dashboard views. The UI uses a dark luxury visual language with strong product imagery, clear category navigation, and focused purchase actions.
result: A polished Django e-commerce prototype suitable for a floral brand portfolio, showing both customer-facing shopping flows and backend/admin-oriented store management features.

title: Artist Portfolio
imageAlt: Dark experimental interface for the Monolith music label website
description: A clean, responsive portfolio website for showcasing watercolor artworks. The site includes a public gallery experience with featured works, artist/about sections.
challenge: The main challenge was building an elegant artist-focused portfolio that could work both as a static visual showcase and as a manageable gallery system, while keeping the interface simple enough for non-technical artwork updates.
solution: I built the project with Django, using an Artwork model for title, image, year, medium, size, description, visibility, featured state, and ordering. The public page displays database artworks when available and falls back to bundled sample images when the gallery is empty. I also created a staff-only studio dashboard for adding, editing, hiding, and deleting artworks.
result: The final result is a polished watercolor portfolio website with a calm visual identity, responsive gallery layout, contact section, and a practical private dashboard that allows the artist to manage artworks without editing code.

title: Neural Forge
role: Product Design / UI Design / Web Development
imageAlt: AI developer platform landing page interface for Neural Forge
description: A technical landing-page concept with a sharper product story, modular UI sections, and enough attitude to avoid default SaaS patterns.
challenge: Make an AI developer product feel credible and technical without slipping into generic SaaS.
solution: Combined dense product messaging, strong UI frames, and reusable landing-page sections.
interaction: Component previews use small motion cues while preserving reading flow and keyboard access.
accessibilityNotes: High-contrast sections, semantic content order, and reduced-motion-friendly interactions.
result: A credible product-page direction that explains the tool while showing front-end craft.
